queries.question: Customer ids with loyalty 'gold' or 'platinum'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'gold' OR loyalty_level = 'platinum'

queries.question: Customer ids whose loyalty is one of 'gold', 'platinum'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level IN ('gold', 'platinum')

queries.question: Customer ids with loyalty 'bronze' or 'silver'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'bronze' OR loyalty_level = 'silver'

queries.question: Customer ids whose loyalty is one of 'bronze', 'silver'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level IN ('bronze', 'silver')

queries.question: Customer ids with loyalty 'gold' or 'silver'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level = 'gold' OR loyalty_level = 'silver'

queries.question: Customer ids whose loyalty is one of 'gold', 'silver'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE loyalty_level IN ('gold', 'silver')

queries.question: Invoice ids with total between 100 and 300 inclusive.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount BETWEEN 100 AND 300

queries.question: Invoice ids with total at least 100 and at most 300.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount >= 100 AND total_amount <= 300

queries.question: Invoice ids with total between 200 and 500 inclusive.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount BETWEEN 200 AND 500

queries.question: Invoice ids with total at least 200 and at most 500.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount >= 200 AND total_amount <= 500

queries.question: Invoice ids with total between 50 and 150 inclusive.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount BETWEEN 50 AND 150

queries.question: Invoice ids with total at least 50 and at most 150.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount >= 50 AND total_amount <= 150

queries.question: Invoice ids with total between 300 and 700 inclusive.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount BETWEEN 300 AND 700

queries.question: Invoice ids with total at least 300 and at most 700.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE total_amount >= 300 AND total_amount <= 700

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients having at least one 'completed' appointment (via join).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.status = 'completed'

queries.question: Ids of patients for whom a 'completed' appointment exists (via EXISTS).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id FROM patients p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND a.status = 'completed')

queries.question: Ids of patients whose id appears among 'completed' appointments (via IN).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed')

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients having at least one 'cancelled' appointment (via join).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.status = 'cancelled'

queries.question: Ids of patients for whom a 'cancelled' appointment exists (via EXISTS).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id FROM patients p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND a.status = 'cancelled')

queries.question: Ids of patients whose id appears among 'cancelled' appointments (via IN).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'cancelled')

queries.question: Distinct ids of patients having at least one 'no_show' appointment (via join).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.patient_id FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.status = 'no_show'

queries.question: Ids of patients for whom a 'no_show' appointment exists (via EXISTS).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_id FROM patients p WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appointments a WHERE a.patient_id = p.patient_id AND a.status = 'no_show')

queries.question: Ids of patients whose id appears among 'no_show' appointments (via IN).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'no_show')

queries.question: Ids of electronics products (positive filter).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category = 'electronics'

queries.question: Ids of products whose category equals 'electronics' — worded differently.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category IN ('electronics')

queries.question: Ids of products not in any category other than 'electronics'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE NOT category <> 'electronics'

queries.question: Ids of furniture products (positive filter).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category = 'furniture'

queries.question: Ids of products whose category equals 'furniture' — worded differently.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE category IN ('furniture')

queries.question: Ids of products not in any category other than 'furniture'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT product_id FROM products WHERE NOT category <> 'furniture'

queries.question: Distinct ids of players who batted in 2010 (plain).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2010

queries.question: Distinct 2010 batter ids, phrased again.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2010 GROUP BY playerID

queries.question: Distinct ids of players who batted in 2015 (plain).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015

queries.question: Distinct 2015 batter ids, phrased again.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015 GROUP BY playerID

queries.question: Distinct ids of players who batted in 2019 (plain).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2019

queries.question: Distinct 2019 batter ids, phrased again.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2019 GROUP BY playerID

queries.question: Ids of Red products via equality.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color = 'Red'

queries.question: Ids of Red products via IN-list.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color IN ('Red')

queries.question: Ids of products whose color matches 'Red' exactly (LIKE without wildcards).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color LIKE 'Red'

queries.question: Ids of Black products via equality.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color = 'Black'

queries.question: Ids of Black products via IN-list.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color IN ('Black')

queries.question: Ids of products whose color matches 'Black' exactly (LIKE without wildcards).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT ProductID FROM Product WHERE Color LIKE 'Black'

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'unpaid'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'unpaid'

queries.question: Invoice ids whose payment status is exactly 'unpaid' (reworded).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status IN ('unpaid')

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'partial'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'partial'

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'paid'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'paid'

queries.question: Invoice ids whose payment status is exactly 'paid' (reworded).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status IN ('paid')

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'unpaid'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'unpaid'

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'partial'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'partial'

queries.question: Invoice ids whose payment status is exactly 'partial' (reworded).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status IN ('partial')

queries.question: Invoice ids with payment status 'paid'.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT invoice_id FROM invoices WHERE payment_status = 'paid'
